use_cases: Interactive background for hero sections and landing pages
Mouse-reactive canvas effect for engaging user experience
Dynamic visual element for modern web applications
Cursor-repelling dot field animation as decorative background
Animated pattern for creating visual interest in empty spaces
ai_summary: A canvas-based interactive dot field component where colorful dots repel away from the mouse cursor and smoothly return to their original positions. Features configurable colors, spacing, dot radius, repel force, and animation timing. Suitable as an engaging background element for SaaS landing pages and modern web applications requiring interactive visual effects.
